description: Large number that counts up from zero to the target value with label and context

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title above the count, e.g. 'TOTAL VICTIMS'
fields.COUNT_VALUE: The final value to count to, e.g. '247' or '1,400'
fields.COUNT_LABEL: Short label above the number, e.g. 'CONFIRMED BREACHES'
fields.SUB_LABEL: Label below the number, e.g. 'IN 2024 ALONE'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: One line source or context, e.g. 'Source: FBI IC3 Report 2024'
